prerequisites: An active Printify account with access to print-on-demand shops.
A Printify Personal Access Token generated from your account (provided via the api_token field).

authMethods.name: Personal Access Token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Printify authenticates requests with a Personal Access Token sent as an HTTP Authorization: Bearer header against https://api.printify.com/v1/. Generate the token in your Printify account under My Profile > Connections. Tokens are valid for one year and then must be regenerated. Provide the token in the connector's api_token field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Personal Access Token
setupSteps.body: Log in to Printify, go to My Profile and then the Connections section. In Connections, generate a Personal Access Token. Note that the token is valid for one year, after which you must generate a new one.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated Personal Access Token in the connector's required api_token field. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer header to the Printify API at https://api.printify.com/v1/.

sources.title: Printify API Reference - Authentication and Overview
